name: Formal Methods
description: Formal verification with Lean 4, Coq, and Z3 SMT solver. Type-check proofs, compile theories, and solve satisfiability problems.
author: Prismer Team

tools.name: lean_check
tools.description: Type-check Lean 4 code and return the output

tools.name: coq_check
tools.description: Check a Coq proof for correctness

tools.name: coq_compile
tools.description: Compile a Coq file to a .vo object file

tools.name: z3_solve
tools.description: Solve a satisfiability problem using Z3 SMT solver

formula.description: SMT-LIB2 formula to solve (used when format is 'smt2')

code.description: Z3 Python code to execute (used when format is 'python')

format.description: Input format: 'smt2' for SMT-LIB2 or 'python' for Z3 Python API

tools.name: prover_status
tools.description: Check which formal provers are available and their versions
